creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
After a successful update:
FreeBSD g1-70.catwhisker.org 12.3-STABLE FreeBSD 12.3-STABLE #1148 stable/12-n234569-4772e4135cb: Wed Dec 22 04:45:58 PST 2021     root@g1-70.catwhisker.org:/common/S1/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/CANARY  amd64 1203502 1203502

the OSVERSION test is no longer a problem: I was able to revert x11/nvidia-driver/Makefile back to the pristine c1eb97fea020ac09dc329651c4f33436e071997b version without problems.
